title: Bestal Three

'''Bestal Three''' was a [[Jungle/Legends|jungle]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Varada sector/Legends|Varada sector]]. Its [[Plant/Legends|flora]] included the [[vortal tree]], the [[Seed/Legends|seeds]] of which had medicinal properties. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the entrepreneur [[Alara Fax]] secured the rights for her company, [[Fax Ventures]], to [[Mining/Legends|mine]] the [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] of the nearby [[Kadal Asteroid Field]] and process the extracted [[Ore/Legends|ores]] on Bestal Three. The asteroid mining also served as cover for the manufacture of efficient [[Medpac/Legends|medpacs]] from [[Stimulant/Legends|stimulants]] derived from the vortal [[Tree/Legends|tree]] seeds.

==Description==
Bestal Three was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Bestal system/Legends|Bestal system]],<ref name="Polyhedron" /> a part of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Varada sector/Legends|Varada sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It occupied the third [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position in its [[Star system/Legends|star system]] and was situated close to the [[Kadal Asteroid Field]]. Bestal Three's terrain featured lush [[Jungle/Legends|jungle]], with the [[vortal tree]] being one example of the local [[Plant/Legends|flora]].<ref name="Polyhedron" />

==History==
[[File:AlaraFax.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Alara Fax secured corporate rights to Bestal Three.]]
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Alara Fax]], the head of the company [[Fax Ventures]], sought to exact vengeance upon her old rival, the [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation's]] Varada [[Sector/Legends|sector]] holdings [[Top OpEx|top operating executive]] [[Tyanna Tymb]]. To that end, Fax studied the sector's [[Star/Legends|star]] systems in search of business opportunities with which she could compete with Tymb. Eventually, Fax discovered the medicinal properties of Bestal Three's vortal [[Tree/Legends|trees']] [[Seed/Legends|seeds]] as well as the large deposits of [[aluminite]] and [[corax]] [[Ore/Legends|ores]] present in the [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] of the Kadal Asteroid Field.<ref name="Polyhedron" />

Fax then secured a contract that allowed her company to [[Mining/Legends|mine]] the asteroids and process the ore on Bestal Three. The asteroid mining provided a cover for an even more profitable activity: the seeds of the vortal trees were harvested and used to produce healing [[Stimulant/Legends|stimulants]] from which [[Medpac/Legends|medpacs]] of improved efficiency were manufactured. When Tymb later purchased [[Merchant/Legends|trade]] and resource rights for the Bestal system, she discovered the Fax Ventures' corporate rights to the Kadal Asteroid Field and Bestal Three and subsequently became determined to acquire for the SoroSuub Corporation the rights to the entire system.<ref name="Polyhedron" />

==Behind the scenes==
Bestal Three was introduced in "[[Adversaries: Characters for the Star Wars: New Republic Campaign]]," a [[roleplaying game]] source article authored by [[Bill Slavicsek]] for use with [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' and published in the [[Polyhedron 97|ninety-seventh issue]] of the ''[[Polyhedron]]'' magazine in [[July]] [[1994]]. Since that article was released outside of the [[Lucas Licensing]] process,<ref name="Polyhedron" /> it was considered non-[[canon]]ical with respect to the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity.<ref name="UnlicensedStatus">{{UnlicensedStatus}}</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Bestal system, and therefore Bestal Three, in grid square I-19.<ref name="TEA Bestal" />
